description.value: Price 132,000 gp; Slot neck; CL 11th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate divination and enchantment DESCRIPTION A creature wearing this thick necklace is automatically aware of all constructs within 60 feet as per the lifesense ability but only sensing constructs. Constructs canât see, hear, or otherwise detect the presence of the wearer, even when using extraordinary or supernatural sensory capabilities such as blindsense, blindsight, scent, or tremorsense. If the wearer touches a construct or attacks any creature, this concealing ability ceases to function for 1 minute. Constructs with an Intelligence score of 3 or greater can attempt a DC 18 Will save to detect the wearer. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 66,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells invisibility, locate object
